title: Risk sentiment boosted by lower than expected inflation
section_path: Risk sentiment boosted by lower than expected inflation
section_path_text: Risk sentiment boosted by lower than expected inflation
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A risk-on rally across markets saw commodities surge higher. A lower-than-expected inflation print sparked the rally, while a weaker USD added support. Ongoing easing of virus controls in China boosted sentiment.
